SEARCH
Package com.nib.grammars

Interface IdcamsParserListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
IdcamsParserBaseListener
public interface IdcamsParserListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.

    Methods inherited from interface org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener

    enterEveryRule, exitEveryRule, visitErrorNode, visitTerminal

  • Method Details

    • enterCommands

      void enterCommands(IdcamsParser.CommandsContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.commands().
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree

    • exitCommands

      void exitCommands(IdcamsParser.CommandsContext ctx)
      Exit a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.commands().
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree

    • enterStatement

      void enterStatement(IdcamsParser.StatementContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.statement().
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree

    • exitStatement

      void exitStatement(IdcamsParser.StatementContext ctx)
      Exit a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.statement().
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree

    • enterDefine

      void enterDefine(IdcamsParser.DefineContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by IdcamsParser.define().

    • enterDefineAlias
